hero.title: LifeRadar Premium
hero.subtitle: Advanced features are being planned for a future Premium offering. Nothing is locked yet.

transparency.title: Our transparency commitment
transparency.body: LifeRadar will remain accessible, but advanced intelligence and automation features may become part of a future premium offering.

areas.title: Planned Premium Areas
areas.subtitle: These are being explored – nothing is locked or enforced yet.

ai.title: AI-Based Life Insights
ai.desc: Intelligent analysis of your life pillars to surface patterns and suggest priorities.

finance.title: Advanced Financial Tracking
finance.desc: Deeper spending analysis, budget goals, and trend forecasting across expense categories.

reminders.title: Predictive Reminders & Alerts
reminders.desc: Smart reminders that adapt to your habits and proactively flag upcoming deadlines.

analytics.title: Cross-Life Analytics
analytics.desc: A unified dashboard offering insights across all life pillars simultaneously.

mobile.title: Future Mobile App Intelligence
mobile.desc: Native mobile features including widgets, offline mode, and device-aware notifications.

earlyAccess.title: Early Access
earlyAccess.subtitle: Register your interest and we will reach out when these features are ready.
earlyAccess.feedbackLabel: What feature would you pay for?
earlyAccess.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us which feature matters most to you (optional)…
earlyAccess.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
earlyAccess.successBody: Thanks. You are on the early access list.
